title: Synchronized scrolling hook for editor and preview panes
purpose: Provides synchronized scrolling between editor and preview panes using proportional scroll positions while preventing feedback loops through debouncing and source tracking.
module_context: Exports a hook function useSyncScroll and a debounce utility function. The hook manages scroll synchronization state and event listeners for two DOM elements.

methods.name: debounce
methods.normalized_params: <T extends (...args: unknown[]) => void>(fn: T, delay: number): T

steps.content: Create a debounced version of the provided function that delays execution by the specified time.
Cancel any pending execution when the debounced function is called again before delay expires.
Execute the original function after the delay has passed.
Reset the timeout reference after execution completes.
Initialize the sync state based on the enabled option.
Track the source of scroll events to prevent infinite loops.
Define callback functions to toggle, enable, or disable synchronization.
Set up scroll event listeners on both editor and preview containers when sync is enabled.
Calculate proportional scroll position for the editor and apply it to the preview.
Calculate proportional scroll position for the preview and apply it to the editor.
Clean up event listeners when the component unmounts or sync is disabled.
Skip execution if the scroll originated from the preview pane.
Mark the editor as the source of the scroll event.
Calculate the proportional scroll position of the editor.
Apply the proportional scroll position to the preview pane.
Reset the scroll source tracking after the debounce delay.
Skip execution if the scroll originated from the editor pane.
Mark the preview as the source of the scroll event.
Calculate the proportional scroll position of the preview.
Apply the proportional scroll position to the editor pane.
Reset the scroll source tracking after the debounce delay.
